reason: The prompt targets a coherent, high-value judgment axis (two threshold mechanisms plus Ni4+-governed NMC stability), but as a SHORT_ANSWER item it provides no explicit options/decoys, making decoy craftsmanship and single-fault purity unassessable and limiting discriminative calibration. Boundary conditions are mostly tight, yet the free-response format invites broad, partially correct narratives (e.g., generic “thermal runaway” or “overcharge causes heat”) that may be hard to score consistently against the intended distinct-mechanism separation and specific Ni4+/Mn/Co roles.
